decks.notes: The deck focuses on assembling the combo pieces for a quick win using Doomsday to set up a winning pile with Thassa's Oracle. The deck includes efficient cantrips and disruption spells to help find and protect the combo pieces. It also includes some disruptive creatures like Brazen Borrower and Orcish Bowmasters to control the board, while using cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent for card advantage and pressure. This deck aims to efficiently combo off and win the game before the opponent can establish their strategy.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressively attacking opponents with powerful creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Amped Raptor, while disrupting their strategy with cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize. The deck also utilizes synergy between cards like Voice of Victory and Goblin Bombardment, as well as utilizing lands like Karakas and Wasteland to control the battlefield. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah adds additional versatility and power to the deck, allowing for a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle that can quickly overwhelm opponents.

This deck revolves around playing aggressively and trying to get a strong start to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It aims to have a lot of mana acceleration and disruptive elements to control the game early on, while also incorporating cards that can provide card advantage and board presence. The goal is to establish a solid board presence and maintain pressure on the opponent, using a combination of creatures, mana acceleration, and disruption to control the game and secure a win as fast as possible.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to quickly pressure the opponent. It also includes disruption spells like Daze and Force of Will to protect your creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Lightning Bolt and Wasteland while generating card advantage with Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The inclusion of Mystic Sanctuary and Stock Up allows for recurring key spells to maintain pressure and control throughout the game.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay by utilizing a combination of efficient creatures, disruptive spells, and powerful equipment to quickly overwhelm opponents. The inclusion of Yorion as a companion allows for additional value through blinking cards like Skyclave Apparition and Stoneforge Mystic. The mix of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and hand disruption like Thoughtseize helps control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a combination of strong creatures like Ocelot Pride, Guide of Souls, and Overlord of the Balemurk, this deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of disruptive elements such as Thoughtseize, Daze, and Force of Will to control the board while playing efficient threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out the game quickly. The deck aims to maintain tempo by disrupting the opponent's game plan and applying pressure with aggressive creatures, all while maintaining card advantage through cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Brainstorm. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's aggressive strategy and ensure consistent access to all needed colors of mana.

The deck focuses on using lands as both disruptive elements and win conditions. By utilizing cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter to disrupt the opponent's mana base, alongside cards like Life from the Loam to recur lands and control the board, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the deck can assemble powerful land combinations such as Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to quickly close out the game. Through a combination of control elements and land synergy, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in a long game.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and disruptive tactics like Wasteland and Stifle. The Stoneforge Mystic package provides additional versatility by fetching powerful equipment like Batterskull and Meteor Sword. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Quantum Riddler offer card advantage and selection, while Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provides a resilient threat. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan, protect its own threats, and eventually overwhelm the opponent with incremental advantage.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures and disruption spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes powerful creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls, supported by removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Cabal Therapy. It also has land destruction with Wasteland and disruption with Thoughtseize. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately winning through quick and decisive attacks. The mix of creatures, removal, disruption, and land destruction makes this deck a formidable force in the Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing lands and disruptive spells to slow down opponents while steadily building up resources. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth, Wasteland, and Thespian's Stage to disrupt opponents' land base, while also using cards like Urza's Saga and Dark Depths to create powerful threats. Additionally, cards like Exploration and Life from the Loam help to ensure consistent land drops and card advantage, ultimately leading to victory through strategic control and resource management.

The main focus of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with powerful Eldrazi creatures and disrupt their game plan with disruptive spells like Chalice of the Void. By using fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide, you can drop threats like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher ahead of schedule. With the combination of aggressive creatures and disruption, you aim to put pressure on your opponent from the beginning of the game and close out the match before they have a chance to recover.

This deck focuses on generating mana quickly and efficiently using cards like Chrome Mox, Dark Ritual, and Lotus Petal, in order to cast multiple spells in a single turn to build storm count. By combining cards like Burning Wish and Infernal Tutor with Tendrils of Agony or Ad Nauseam, the deck can win the game by dealing lethal damage or drawing the entire deck. Manipulating the opponent's hand with cards like Duress and Thoughtseize and utilizing the power of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion add extra layers of strategy to this combo-focused deck.

This deck focuses on quickly disrupting your opponent's game plan while steadily building your own board presence. By utilizing a mix of discard spells, counterspells, and removal, you can control the tempo of the game and prevent your opponent from executing their strategy effectively. Additionally, creatures like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provide strong threats that can quickly close out the game if left unchecked. The deck's synergy between disruption and aggression creates a challenging and adaptable playstyle that can catch opponents off guard and secure you a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Dredge mechanic to fill the graveyard with key cards such as Golgari Grave-Troll and Stinkweed Imp. By sacrificing Narcomoeba and other creatures with Cabal Therapy and Bridge from Below, the deck aims to generate a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. Cards like Faithless Looting and Breakthrough help to dig deeper into the deck and find necessary combo pieces like Dread Return and Thassa's Oracle for a game-winning finish. Ultimately, the deck focuses on graveyard synergy and combo potential to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy using cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, while also maintaining a strong board position with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Snapcaster Mage. The deck emphasizes tempo advantage and card selection through Brainstorm and Ponder, while also having cards like Back to Basics to further disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, this deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver its opponent in order to secure victory.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard using cards like Reanimate, Animate Dead, and Shallow Grave. By discarding creatures with Unmask and Faithless Looting, and fast mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual, the deck aims to cheat creatures into play ahead of schedule. With the use of combo pieces like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand, the deck can overwhelm opponents with powerful threats early in the game. The inclusion of disruption spells like Cabal Therapy helps to protect the combo and disrupt opponent's strategies.
